reasoning.revenue_impact_logic: Calculated based on 14 orders in jeopardy multiplied by an average order value of $24k, adjusting for partial recovery probability.
reasoning.sla_risk_factors: Customer commitments allow 4 days late delivery max. The 12-day delay minus the 8 days of buffer gives us a net 4-day deficit, pushing SLAs into the red.
reasoning.stockout_probability_rationale: Given normal buffer depletion rates (230 units/day) and the 12-day resupply halt, 84% of simulation runs showed stock hitting zero before the next inbound.

novatech_dis_001.explanation: With a 12-day delay at Shanghai port and only 8 days of MCU buffer inventory, NovaTech faces a high probability of production line stoppage. Single-source dependency amplifies exposure significantly.

supplier_email.subject: Urgent: Expedited Allocation Request — MCU Lot
supplier_email.body:
Dear Partner,

Due to the ongoing Shanghai port disruption (12-day delay, Typhoon Vera), we are activating our contingency sourcing protocol.

We request expedited allocation of 2,000 units of PART_MCU (STM32F4 series) for air freight delivery by March 12, 2026.

Please confirm availability and pricing within 4 hours. A formal PO will follow immediately.

Best regards,
NovaTech Procurement Team

escalation.note: Revenue at risk ($340K) exceeds the $250K escalation threshold. Production line stoppage probable within 8 days without intervention. Recommend immediate approval of alternate supplier qualification budget.

reasoning_trace.detail: Port congestion, 12-day delay, East Asia — Shanghai Yangshan
NovaTech: single-source MCU, low buffer (8 days), lead time 75 days
Current stock: 1,840 units. Daily consumption: 230 units
P(stockout) = 0.65 within 14-day window given delay distribution
Scored on cost (40%), service level (35%), resilience (25%)
Alt Supplier wins with composite score 0.82 vs Expedite 0.71, Buffer 0.74
Generated supplier email, PO suggestion, and VP escalation note

reasoning.revenue_impact_logic: 7 orders mapped to these MCUs totaling $180k. Revenue recognition is delayed but not lost immediately due to customer slack.
reasoning.sla_risk_factors: Most orders have lenient SLA penalties. 3–6 weeks added lead time only breaches contracts for 2 of the 7 affected customers.
reasoning.stockout_probability_rationale: Medium buffer mitigates immediate shock. Stockout risk assumes Taiwan controls extend beyond the 21-day safety stock.

novatech_dis_002.explanation: New Taiwan export controls add 3–6 weeks to lead times. With medium buffer, NovaTech has time to qualify alternate suppliers or pre-order through bonded warehouses.

supplier_email.subject: RFQ — STM32 Equivalent MCU, EU-Sourced
supplier_email.body:
Dear Team,

Due to new Taiwan export controls impacting our primary supply chain, we are evaluating EU-sourced alternatives.

Please provide pricing and availability for 5,000 units of an STM32F4-equivalent MCU for Q2 delivery.

Regards,
NovaTech Procurement

reasoning_trace.detail: Taiwan export controls, 3–6 week additional lead time
NovaTech: single-source MCU, low buffer, lead time 75 days
Current buffer covers 14 days; control delays add 21–42 days
Bonded warehouse, EU supplier, fast-track licensing
EU supplier: best resilience score (0.75) at moderate cost

reasoning.revenue_impact_logic: High perishable volume turnover. $520k corresponds directly to retail contracts bound to Salinas supply this week.
reasoning.sla_risk_factors: Perishables have zero SLA tolerance for lateness. Any missing shipments instantly trigger financial penalties and lost shelf space.
reasoning.stockout_probability_rationale: Secondary farms in Arizona max out at 65% capacity requirement. The 35% shortfall guarantees partial stockouts across 23 orders.

freshchain_dis_005.explanation: A 35% yield reduction in Salinas Valley directly affects FreshChain's core product lines. Dual-source provides some buffer, but secondary suppliers cannot cover full volume for more than 10 days.

supplier_email.subject: Urgent Volume Request — Leafy Greens, March Delivery
supplier_email.body:
Dear ArizonaFresh Team,

Due to the ongoing drought conditions impacting our primary Salinas Valley supply, we are activating our contingency agreement.

We require 180,000 lbs of mixed greens and 90,000 lbs of spinach for the week of March 10–14 delivery window.

Please confirm capacity and pricing within 6 hours.

FreshChain Procurement

escalation.note: Drought impact exceeds single-event threshold. Recommend activating full Arizona contingency contract and reviewing Q2 sourcing diversification plan.

reasoning_trace.detail: 35% yield reduction, Salinas Valley, drought-related
FreshChain: dual-source, medium buffer (~10 days), short lead time 14 days
ArizonaFresh can cover 65% of gap volume within SLA
Spot market, Arizona farm, SKU rationalization
Arizona farm: highest composite score (0.82), pre-qualified
Emergency PO and CSO escalation generated

reasoning.revenue_impact_logic: Only $120k at risk primarily due to spot-market price absorption eating into margins on fixed-price contracts rather than absolute loss of sale.
reasoning.sla_risk_factors: High buffer of 45 days completely shields immediate customer deliveries from disruption.
reasoning.stockout_probability_rationale: Extremely low probability. The 45-day runway far exceeds the time needed to pivot sourcing to domestic alloy alternatives.

steelwright_dis_008.explanation: Ukraine export ban affects spot pricing but SteelWright's multi-source strategy and high buffer provide substantial cushion. Risk is manageable with cost hedging.

cons: Leaves no cushion for follow-on events

supplier_email.subject: Accelerated PO Request — Specialty Alloy Sheet
supplier_email.body:
Dear Nucor Team,

Given current European supply disruptions, we'd like to accelerate our Q2 alloy order to Q1 delivery.

Please confirm availability of 500 MT of Grade 4140 alloy steel sheet for delivery by March 20.

SteelWright Procurement

reasoning_trace.detail: Ukraine export ban, 90-day duration, specialty alloy pricing impact
SteelWright: multi-source, high buffer (45 days), lead time 45 days
High buffer covers full disruption window; risk is medium-term pricing
Buffer drawdown, domestic acceleration, futures hedge
Domestic acceleration: best resilience gain at reasonable cost
